message.content:
# PREONE – COMPLETE ERP ARCHITECTURE  

One Platform. Every Module. All Stakeholders. Unlimited Impact.  


## Our Mission  
Empower preschools to deliver exceptional childhood experiences with technology, data & love. ♥  


## STAKEHOLDERS  
- **Parents**  
  Stay Connected  
- **Children**  
  Happy & Safe  
- **Teachers**  
  Teach & Nurture  
- **Admin / Principal**  
  Manage Efficiently  
- **School Owner**  
  Grow & Scale  
- **Investors**  
  Monitor Returns  


## ERP MODULES  
1. **Student Management**  
   - Student Profiles  
   - Enrollment  
   - Documents  
   - Medical Records  
   - Sibling Management  
   - Student Progress  

2. **Parent Management**  
   - Parent Profiles  
   - Multiple Guardians  
   - Communication Pref.  
   - KYC & Verification  
   - Parent Portal Access  

3. **Teacher Management**  
   - Teacher Profiles  
   - Qualifications  
   - Experience  
   - Work Schedule  
   - Performance Reviews  
   - Attendance & Leaves  

4. **Academics & Curriculum**  
   - Curriculum Management  
   - Lesson Plans  
   - Daily Activities  
   - Learning Goals  
   - Milestones  
   - Class Plans  

5. **Attendance Management**  
   - Daily Attendance  
   - Real-time Tracking  
   - Absentees Alert  
   - Monthly Reports  
   - Attendance Analytics  

6. **Fee Management**  
   - Fee Structures  
   - Invoices  
   - Online Payments  
   - Receipts  
   - Refunds  
   - Fee Reports  

7. **Transport Management**  
   - Route Management  
   - Vehicle Tracking  
   - Driver Details  
   - Pickup/Drop Alerts  
   - Transport Attendance  
   - Safety Alerts  

8. **Communication Center**  
   - SMS / WhatsApp  
   - Push Notifications  
   - Email  
   - Notices & Announcements  
   - Event Invitations  
   - Two-way Chat  

9. **Events & Calendar**  
   - Event Management  
   - School Calendar  
   - Holidays  
   - Reminders  
   - RSVP & Participation  

10. **Activities & Observations**  
    - Activity Planning  
    - Photo & Video Upload  
    - Classroom Moments  
    - Teacher Observations  
    - Daily Reports  

11. **AI Growth Engine**  
    - Observation Analysis  
    - Growth Scores  
    - Development Insights  
    - Recommendations  
    - AI Reports for Parents  

12. **Reports & Analytics**  
    - Student Reports  
    - Teacher Reports  
    - Attendance Reports  
    - Fee Reports  
    - Custom Analytics  
    - Export & Share  


## KEY BENEFITS  
- All-in-One Platform  
- Saves Time & Effort  
- Improves Communication  
- Data-Driven Decisions  
- Enhances Child Development  
- Boosts Admissions & Revenue  
- Scalable & Future-Ready  


## SYSTEM HIGHLIGHTS  
- Cloud-Based & Secure  
- Mobile First Design  
- Real-time Updates  
- AI-Powered Insights  
- Easy to Use  
- Customizable  
- Scalable for Growth  


## SYSTEM INTEGRATION LAYER  
- Payment Gateway (Razorpay / Stripe)  
- SMS Gateway (Twilio / MSG91)  
- WhatsApp API (Meta Business)  
- Email Service (AWS SES / SendGrid)  
- Cloud Storage (AWS S3 / Firebase)  
- Video Streaming (AWS CloudFront)  
- Maps & Location (Google Maps)  
- AI Services (OpenAI / Custom)  


## DATA FLOW ARCHITECTURE  
- **Mobile Apps**  
  Parent App  
  Teacher App  
- **Web Portal**  
  Admin Portal  
  Teacher Portal  
- **API Gateway**  
  Secure REST APIs  
  Authentication  
  Rate Limiting  
- **Application Services**  
  Business Logic  
  Microservices  
  Background Jobs  
- **Database Layer**  
  PostgreSQL (Primary)  
  Redis (Cache)  
  File Storage  
- **Analytics & AI**  
  Data Processing  
  AI/ML Models  
  Insights Engine  


## MULTI-BRANCH ARCHITECTURE  
- **Head Office (Central System)**  
  Centralized Control • Policies • Templates • Reports • Analytics  
- **Branch - Pune**  
  Independent Operations  
  Local Data & Settings  
- **Branch - Mumbai**  
  Independent Operations  
  Local Data & Settings  
- **Branch - Nashik**  
  Independent Operations  
  Local Data & Settings  
- **Branch - Nagpur**  
  Independent Operations  
  Local Data & Settings  
- **More Branches...**  
  Unlimited Scalability  


## SECURITY & COMPLIANCE  
- Role Based Access Control (RBAC)  
- Data Encryption (At Rest & In Transit)  
- Regular Backups (Automated)  
- Audit Logs (Track Everything)  
- Secure Authentication (2FA / OTP)  
- Compliance Ready (GDPR / DPDP Act)  
- High Availability (99.9% Uptime)  


## TECHNOLOGY STACK  
- **Frontend**  
  Flutter (Mobile)  
  React.js (Web)  
- **Backend**  
  Node.js / NestJS  
- **Database**  
  PostgreSQL  
- **Cloud**  
  AWS / Firebase  
- **DevOps**  
  Docker, CI/CD, Nginx
